title: Kanban Sort Event
description: Represents the payload emitted when an item is dropped to reorder within a status or moved across statuses in the Kanban component.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: AXKanbanSortEvent extends NXNativeEvent and includes indices and updated data source.

props.name: sender
props.description: The Kanban component instance that emitted the event. Inherited from NXEvent.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native mouse event associated with the drop action. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.

props.name: item
props.description: The original data object that was moved.

props.name: allItems
props.description: The complete data source after precise re-indexing, suitable for state updates.

props.name: currentIndex
props.description: The index of the item within the destination status after the drop.

props.name: previousIndex
props.description: The index of the item within the source status before the drop.

props.name: currentStatusKey
props.description: The key of the destination status (column).

props.name: previousStatusKey
props.description: The key of the source status (column).
